parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: $json.type, priority: $json.priority, content: $json.formatted_body, match_id: $json.match_id, correlation_id: $json.correlation_id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO wcic.notifications (
  notification_type, priority, channel, recipient,
  subject, body, metadata, status,
  attempts, max_attempts, sent_at, error_message,
  related_match_id, correlation_id, workflow_execution_id,
  event_dedup_key
) VALUES (
  $1, $2::wcic.notification_priority, $3::wcic.notification_channel, $4,
  $5, $6, $7::jsonb, $8::wcic.notification_status,
  1, 3, $9::timestamptz, $10,
  $11::uuid, $12::uuid, $13,
  $14
)
ON CONFLICT (event_dedup_key)
WHERE event_dedup_key IS NOT NULL
DO UPDATE SET
  attempts = notifications.attempts + 1,
  error_message = EXCLUDED.error_message,
  status = CASE
    WHEN EXCLUDED.status = 'sent' THEN 'sent'::wcic.notification_status
    WHEN notifications.attempts >= notifications.max_attempts THEN 'failed'::wcic.notification_status
    ELSE 'retry'::wcic.notification_status
  END
RETURNING id::text, status, attempts;

additionalFields.queryParams:
={{ [
  $json.payload.type,
  $json.payload.priority,
  $json.payload.channel,
  $json.payload.content?.metadata?.chat_id || $json.payload.channel,
  $json.payload.content?.title || null,
  $json.payload.formatted_body,
  JSON.stringify($json.payload.content?.metadata || {}),
  $json.send_success ? 'sent' : 'failed',
  $json.sent_at || null,
  $json.send_error || null,
  $json.payload.match_id || null,
  $json.payload.correlation_id,
  $json.payload.execution_id || null,
  $json.payload.event_dedup_key || null
] }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO wcic.workflow_logs (
  execution_id, workflow_name, status, started_at,
  finished_at, duration_ms, trigger_type, triggered_by,
  correlation_id, items_processed, output_summary
) VALUES (
  $1, 'WF-07-notification-hub', $2::wcic.workflow_status, $3::timestamptz,
  NOW(),
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - $3::timestamptz)) * 1000,
  'sub-workflow', $4, $5::uuid, 1,
  $6::jsonb
);
